description:
Learn how SBB Cargo uses a data ingestion and processing pipeline built with Amazon API Gateway, AWS Lambda, Amazon Kinesis that is completely serverless and extremely flexible.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: SBB Cargo: Data Collection and Processing with Serverless Analytics Services
